utterance_pair.utterance: Hi! I'm planning a trip to Cambridge and looking for a restaurant in the city centre that serves Belgian food. I read that the Large Hadron Collider can recreate conditions just after the Big Bang, which is fascinating and shows how particle physics can push the boundaries of our understanding of the universe. Can you help me find one?

Thanks for acknowledging my comment! It's fascinating how far we've come in AI technology; I was reading about how it can now even predict particle behaviors more accurately. Please go ahead and book a table for 8 people at Hotel du Vin and Bistro for 11:15 on Wednesday.

Thanks for the reference! Now, I'm looking for the Alpha-Milton Guest House in Cambridge. Can you help me find it? I want to book it for 8 people for 3 nights starting from Wednesday, the same day as the restaurant booking. By the way, I read that the Large Hadron Collider has generated more data in one year than all of humanity has produced throughout history.

That's amazing how much data the LHC generates! Could you please provide me with the booking reference number for the Alpha-Milton Guest House? I also read that Belgium has some of the best beer in the world, and their chocolate is highly rated too.

Thanks for the booking reference! Lastly, I need to book a taxi to commute between the Alpha-Milton Guest House and Hotel du Vin and Bistro. Could you please provide the contact number and car type? The taxi should ensure the group arrives at the restaurant by 11:15 on Wednesday.
